title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on heritage, culture and identity.

questions.question: To what extent do you think a country's cultural heritage shapes its national identity, and is this always positive?
Some people argue that investing in cultural heritage is a luxury compared to addressing poverty and inequality. Do you agree?

script.text: To what extent do you think a country's cultural heritage shapes its national identity, and is this always positive?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
